cards.back: An array that stores elements one after the other in the same memory location.
An array that stores elements in rows and columns, with each row being a one-dimensional array.

cards.front: What is the syntax to initialize a One-Dimensional Array in C++?
What is the syntax to initialize a Two-Dimensional Array in C++?
What is the difference between the syntax for One-Dimensional and Two-Dimensional Arrays in C++?
cards.back: For one-dimensional arrays, we use square brackets [], while for two-dimensional arrays, we use double square brackets [][].
